title: For Adventure Edit — China travel-video storyboard
html:
For Adventure Edit

Source: 2024-08-31 Apple Note, modified 2024-10-15. Storyboard / mood-board for a travel-edit video Yahir was planning during the early China chapter — first weeks in Shanghai. The note captures structure ("days flashing by"), emotional pacing ("oscillation of beautiful moments and darker moments"), and a 3-track music plan.

TL;DR

  • Storyboard plan: starting / ending scene of days flashing by, with the body of the edit oscillating between beautiful and darker moments — a deliberate emotional-pacing structure, not just a highlights reel
  • Music selections: "A Moment Apart" (ODESZA), "I've Been Thinking About Dying", "Iris" (Goo Goo Dolls), and the closer "Lower Your Eyelids to Die With the Sun" by M83
  • Closing track (M83) is the emotional anchor — instrumental, builds for ~9 minutes, often used for "end of an era" edits
  • Same week as the determinants of advanced countries note — Yahir was processing both the macro of China and the micro of his own emotional arc in the same sitting
  • Pattern: Yahir treats his own life as media-worthy footage. Connects to the manifesto style note genre — same impulse, different medium.

Pattern observed

The "oscillation of beautiful moments and darker moments" framing is unusually self-aware for a travel-edit brief. Most people make travel videos that are 100% beautiful moments. Yahir is planning the dark beats in advance — same impulse that produces his most honest written notes. The edit is meant to give the energy of your emotions, not document the trip.

Open questions

  • Did this edit ever get made? Worth checking assets folder for any video files or YouTube uploads from late 2024 / early 2025.
  • The "I've Been Thinking About Dying" track — is this the Hozier song? The film? Worth disambiguating.
